narrative:
Carthage Township (precinct in Athens County) has 979 registered voters, with 59.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 17.9%, a modest Republican lean of 4.6 percentage points.
